name: acurioustale.de
description: Lint tooling for the acurioustale.de landing page. The site itself has no build step; this only provides ESLint and markdownlint-cli2, which are npm-only.
author: Markus Spitzner

scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:md
scripts.links: lychee --config lychee.toml index.html README.md CLAUDE.md SECURITY.md
